tasks.label: Check NVIDIA driver (>= 550)
tasks.detail: Verifies that the host NVIDIA driver is >= 550 and surfaces a warning in Problems view if not.

tasks.label: Update build/.env file
tasks.detail: Sets the variables in build/.env based on the host system configuration.

tasks.label: Run 'catkin_make' in docker container. Choose container from list of running containers.
tasks.command: docker exec -it ${input:container_name} bash -c 'cd /catkin_ws && source /opt/ros/noetic/setup.bash && source devel/setup.bash && catkin_make'
tasks.detail: Executes 'catkin_make' selected container. Requires Tasks Shell Input Extension, in order to generate the list of containers.

tasks.label: Lint python code with ruff
tasks.detail: Manually trigger the ruff linter to check the python files.

tasks.label: Lint python code with ruff and apply safe fixes
tasks.detail: Manually trigger the ruff linter to check the python files and apply the safe fixes that it encounters during linting.

tasks.label: Lint python code with ruff (strict profile)
tasks.detail: Runs stricter lint rules including docstring checks for incremental quality hardening.

tasks.label: Check python code formatting with ruff
tasks.detail: Manually trigger the ruff formatter to check if the formatting of the python files is correct.

tasks.label: Format python code with ruff
tasks.detail: Manually trigger the ruff formatter to format the python files.

tasks.label: Start dev container stack (CUDA)
tasks.detail: Updates build/.env, checks NVIDIA driver, and starts agent-dev via Docker Compose.

tasks.label: Lint current Python file with ruff
tasks.detail: Runs ruff check for the currently active file.

tasks.label: Format current Python file with ruff
tasks.detail: Runs ruff format for the currently active file.

tasks.label: Lint active package with ruff
tasks.command: bash -lc 'if [[ "${relativeFile}" == code/* ]]; then pkg=${relativeFile#code/}; pkg=${pkg%%/*}; ruff check /workspace/code/${pkg}; else echo "Open a file inside code/<package>/... first."; exit 1; fi'
tasks.detail: Runs ruff check on the package derived from the currently active file path.

tasks.label: Check active package formatting with ruff
tasks.command: bash -lc 'if [[ "${relativeFile}" == code/* ]]; then pkg=${relativeFile#code/}; pkg=${pkg%%/*}; ruff format /workspace/code/${pkg} --check; else echo "Open a file inside code/<package>/... first."; exit 1; fi'
tasks.detail: Checks ruff formatting for the package derived from the currently active file path.

tasks.label: Run pytest (unit)
tasks.detail: Runs fast unit tests marked with @pytest.mark.unit.

tasks.label: Run pytest with coverage
tasks.detail: Runs all tests and reports coverage for the code workspace.

tasks.label: Dependency check in dev container
tasks.detail: Validates rosdep and pip dependency health in the running agent-dev container environment.

tasks.label: Synchronize dependencies in dev container
tasks.detail: Installs rosdep and pip dependencies from package.xml and requirements manifests.
